channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Action
item.description: Vox @action decorator: marks imperative handlers and codegen entrypoints for side-effectful operations.

item.title: @island
item.description: Vox @island decorator (documented here as @island): React island components and client hydration boundaries.

item.title: @deprecated
item.description: Vox @deprecated decorator: marks APIs slated for removal and surfaces compiler or doc warnings.

item.title: @index
item.description: Vox @index decorator: database index declarations emitted with @table migrations.

item.title: @mcp.resource
item.description: Vox @mcp.resource decorator: exposes read-only MCP resources with stable URIs for agents.

item.title: @mcp.tool
item.description: Vox @mcp.tool decorator: exposes typed functions as MCP tools with derived JSON Schema for LLM callers.

item.title: @mutation
item.description: Vox @mutation decorator: transactional write paths against VoxDB with compiler-checked schema use.

item.title: @pure
item.description: Vox @pure decorator: marks side-effect-free functions for optimization and tooling contracts.

item.title: @query
item.description: Vox @query decorator: read-only database queries validated against @table types at compile time.

item.title: @require
item.description: Vox @require decorator: compile-time preconditions on types and records enforced on writes.

item.title: @scheduled
item.description: Vox @scheduled decorator: planned periodic tasks and cron-style scheduling metadata.

item.title: @server
item.description: Vox @server decorator: RPC and HTTP handler surfaces with cross-language client codegen.

item.title: @table
item.description: Vox @table decorator: canonical schema DDL, Rust types, and Codex migration emission from one declaration.

item.title: @test
item.description: Vox @test decorator: declares unit tests executed by vox test and the doc example pipeline.

item.title: @v0
item.description: Imports and generates a React component directly from a Vercel v0.dev generation.

item.title: Decorators
item.description: Index of Vox decorators with links to per-decorator API reference pages under docs/src/api/decorators.

item.title: Known Documentation Gaps & Backlog
item.description: Living checklist of documentation gaps, backlog items, and recently completed doc work for contributors.

item.title: Example: Vox Actor Example
item.description: Worked example: Vox actor with messages and state patterns for the internal API docs.

item.title: Example: agent.vox
item.description: Worked example: agent-shaped Vox module for orchestration and tool wiring demos.

item.title: Example: Vox Chatbot Demo
item.description: Worked example: conversational UI and server integration for chatbot-style apps.

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
